findings.warning_banner_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
findings.grok_error_message: Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하거나 다른 모델을 사용해 보세요.

previous_result_comparison.previous: silent block (NDJSON token) - no visible warning
previous_result_comparison.current: WARNING VISIBLE - APF redirect to warning URL with Korean warning banner
previous_result_comparison.improvement: MAJOR IMPROVEMENT - from silent block to clearly visible warning

analysis.what_works: APF intercepts the request, redirects to warning URL with rid parameter. Warning banner with Korean message is clearly visible. Grok shows completion error with retry option.
analysis.recommendation: Grok warning implementation is working correctly. No further changes needed.
